DISCOVERY 612, NTC OF MTN TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGOATORIES AND RESPONSES TO REQ.'S FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS - HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED: PLAINTIFF C&B PROPERTIES, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION IS MOOT AS SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED. THE COURT WILL NOT DETERMINE THE ADEQUACY OF THOSE RESPONSES ON THIS MOTION. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE INITIAL RESPONSES WERE MADE WITHOUT SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,480, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jamie C. Couche, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: C&B Properties, LLC
Kaveh Badiei, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Jeanneett Barnes

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED: Plaintiff C&B Properties, LLC's Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Responses To Requests For Production is moot as supplemental responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. The court finds that the initial responses were made without substantial justification. Sanctions are awarded against DEFENDANT in the amount of $1,480, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
